conventions.commits: Conventional commits with GPG signing and DCO
conventions.testing: Unit tests in *_tests.rs files, integration tests in tests/
conventions.linting: Clippy with pedantic warnings, deny unsafe_code
conventions.error_handling: thiserror for libraries, anyhow for applications

constraints: Must maintain FFI compatibility with existing Swift/iOS bindings
test_coverage: Security scanning has dedicated integration tests but limited unit test coverage

approaches.name: Incremental Migration
approaches.description: Add tree-sitter as optional feature alongside existing scanner

approaches.name: Full Replacement
approaches.description: Replace entire security scanner with tree-sitter based implementation

recommendation: Incremental Migration approach due to lower risk and existing FFI constraints
